Dance

Private classes

I offer both Salsa and Bachata classes to all levels from beginner to advanced. More information with prices here.

Info

Choreographies

Need a choreography for an event, such as wedding, birthday or something else? Let's talk and make magic together!

Contact

To book classes, send me a message and we can together find a time that suits you best.

I speak Spanish and English (Vähän suomea)

Phone: +358 41 312 4778

Email: lady2macias@outlook.es

About me

Hola, My name is Lady Macías.

Originally from South America, but raised in Spain, I am an experienced dancer for many years. I have learnt from the top-dancers around the world owning my personal style.



Let's go to the point, do you want to learn and improve your dancing skills? Are you tired to receive classes while not seeing any changes? Let's dance together and we can take your Salsa and Bachata moves to the next step ✨

To book a private class email me to: lady2macias@gmail.com.
